metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for swipi-engine — the agentic framework for end-to-end web-game creation from a prompt.

plugins.name: swipi-engine
plugins.description: Turn a prompt into a playable Phaser web game end-to-end. Ships the swipi 6-phase workflow (classify → scaffold → GDD → assets → config → code → verify), archetype-aware skills, slash commands (/swipi-new, /swipi-classify, /swipi-scaffold, /swipi-verify), and a debug subagent.
